title: got wrecked by Trump's unpredictable moves early in his term – so I built an AI tool to track it all and generate stock/crypto signals. Just launched the most requested feature: AI chart analysis!
author: xxqxpxx
selftext:
Hey everyone,

Like a lot of us, I took some heavy losses at the start of Trump's second term because of those wild, unpredictable policy swings and announcements. Markets were (and still are) volatile as hell with tariffs, tweets, and everything else shaking things up.
As a developer, I couldn't just sit there – I built a tool to monitor Trump's posts on X, breaking news, weird events, congressional trades, and anything that could move markets. Then, with AI models getting insanely good, I integrated advanced analysis to turn all that noise into actionable insights: daily stock and crypto signals, sentiment scores, and more.

It's been performing really well (verified track record shows solid wins and outperformance vs. S&P this year), so I turned it into a full website: https://trumpmarketindex.com/

The #1 feature my trader friends kept begging for is finally live: AI-Powered Chart Analysis!
You can upload any stock or crypto chart, and the AI instantly breaks it down – trade ideas, key support/resistance levels, trend direction, volume patterns, entry/exit points, stop losses, targets, sentiment, and more.

Try it here: https://trumpmarketindex.com/analyze

There's a free trial (no card needed) to check out live signals and tools.

Would love your honest thoughts – does this help with the Trump-era chaos? Any feedback on the site, signals, or chart analyzer? Roast it if it sucks, I can take it 😂
Not financial advice, obviously – trading is risky, past performance isn't future results, etc.
Thanks for checking it out!
